meta.label: Board Game
meta.name: Who Am I?
meta.description: Who or what am I? A baker, a lion, or even a watering can? In Who am I?, each player fixes a card onto her head with a magnet, then asks the other players yes-or-no questions to determine, "Who am I?" Players need a cool head to win this game because only those who ask just the right questions and combine them in just the right way can come out victorious.

versions.name: Hoy Jugamos a "¿Quién Soy?" (Mr. Wonderful Spanish edition)
Harry Potter: Who Am I? (Multilingual edition)
